svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="optimize-pipeline" id="optimize-pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-164" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ENTRY" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="优化入口
先堆资源,再精细化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRPM" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="优化手段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="360" x="240" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务器扩容
(紧急解决)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="260" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="静态资源接入 CDN
(资源优化)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="430" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Node 端缓存开启
(渲染优化)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="260" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="缓存逻辑精细化
(缓存优化)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="430" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="多语言渲染适配
(功能修复)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="345" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRPE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="优化效果" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="410" x="650" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="保障高峰期稳定性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="670" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="降低 Node 服务压力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="175" x="870" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="减少重复渲染耗时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="670" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="解决多终端多语言
缓存问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="175" x="870" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="保障多语言渲染正常" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="770" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EM1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ENTRY" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="GRPM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EM2" edge="1" parent="1" source="GRPM" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="GRPE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" edge="1" parent="1" source="M1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E1" value="支撑"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" edge="1" parent="1" source="M2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E2" value="减负"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" edge="1" parent="1" source="M3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E3" value="提速"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" edge="1" parent="1" source="M4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E4" value="避坑"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" edge="1" parent="1" source="M5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E5" value="修复"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
